summary: Healthcare management application with patient sessions, expenses tracking, and search/filter capabilities
architectural_notes: Application includes patient session management with expense tracking
Search and filter functionality needed across patient records
Authentication system needs to be revised (Internet Identity removal requested)
known_issues: Login issues reported - Internet Identity causing problems
Build failures occurred when processing complex multi-feature requests

existing_features.title: Add proper ARIA labels to all interactive elements including buttons, form inputs, dialogs, and navigation links throughout the application
Ensure proper keyboard navigation support across all pages including Dashboard, Patients, Staff, Finance, Reports, Backup, Attendance, and Sessions pages with focus management
Add semantic HTML structure with proper heading hierarchy (h1, h2, h3) across all pages and ensure landmark regions (header, nav, main, footer) are properly defined
Improve color contrast ratios to meet WCAG AA standards (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text) across all text and interactive elements in both light and dark modes
Add screen reader announcements for dynamic content updates including successful operations, errors, loading states, and data changes using ARIA live regions
Ensure all form validation errors are accessible with clear error messages associated with their respective form fields using aria-describedby or aria-invalid attributes
Add skip navigation link at the top of the page to allow keyboard users to bypass repetitive navigation and jump directly to main content

new_feature_requests.summary: Patient session filter by patient name
Universal search by name or date across all app features
